messages.content: Write the correct form of the verbs from the parenthesis. a) Bob____________(drink) tea in the morning.
Bob drinks tea in the morning.
b) I_______________(watch) TV in the afternoon.
I watch TV in the afternoon.
c) My best friend___________(go) to the ice rink.
My best friend goes to the ice rink.
d) Ron and Sally____________(visit) their grandparents.
Ron and Sally visit their grandparents.

Unscramble the sentences.
a) swim / Martha and Paul / every Sunday / in the pool
Martha and Paul swim in the pool every Sunday.
b) Spanish / in the classroom / You / speak
You speak Spanish in the classroom.
c) Frank / to school / every day / goes
Frank goes to school every day.
d) mixes / eggs / and / David / vinegar together
David mixes eggs and vinegar together.
3. Write two affirmative sentences in the simple present tense.

1) She plays the piano every day.
2) They eat dinner at 6 o'clock.
3. Write five affirmative sentences in the simple present tense. nmaes

1) Tom goes to the gym twice a week.
2) Sarah reads a book before going to bed.
3) The sun rises in the east.
4) We walk our dog every morning.
5) The train arrives at 9:00 am.
affirmative sentences in the simple present tense with I play.

1) I play soccer every weekend.
2) I play the guitar in a band.
3) I play video games in my free time.
4) I play tennis with my friends.
5) I play the piano at family gatherings.
cuando es el simulador de matriculas UCE

No tengo acceso a información en tiempo real sobre eventos o fechas específicas. Te recomendaría consultar el calendario académico o la página oficial de la Universidad Central del Ecuador para obtener la fecha exacta del simulador de matrículas.
